name: rsvp-timing
description: RSVP timing engine (ORP + per-word pacing) with parity-locked JS and Swift implementations

scripts.check:vectors: node generate-vectors.mjs > /tmp/rsvp-regen.json && { diff -q /tmp/rsvp-regen.json parity-vectors.json >/dev/null || { echo 'FAIL: parity-vectors.json is stale — rsvpTiming.js changed without regenerating. Run: npm run vectors (then re-run npm run check:swift)'; exit 1; }; } && echo 'vectors current'
scripts.check: npm run check:vectors && npm run check:swift
